---
name: 🛠 Add a New Tool
about: Request support for a new tool to be installable via dev-setup
title: "[Tool Request] Add support for <TOOL_NAME>"
labels: ["new-tool", "enhancement"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🛠 Tool Name
<!-- What is the name of the tool? e.g. "Rust", "Flutter", "Bun" -->


## 📦 Category
<!-- Which category does this tool belong to? -->
<!-- core | runtime | editor | ide | framework | cli | devops | cloud | database | testing | mobile -->


## 📝 Description
<!-- One sentence explaining what this tool is -->


## 💡 Why should dev-setup include this?
<!-- Why would developers want this installed? What problem does it solve? -->


## 🖥 OS Support
<!-- Tick all that apply -->
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Ubuntu / Debian
- [ ] Kali Linux

## 📦 Install Commands
<!-- Please provide the install command(s) for each OS you ticked above -->

**macOS (Homebrew):**
```bash
brew install ...
```

**Ubuntu/Kali (apt):**
```bash
sudo apt-get install -y ...
```

**Windows (winget):**
```powershell
winget install --id ...
```

## 🔗 Official Website
<!-- Link to the tool's homepage -->


## ✅ Are you willing to contribute this yourself?
- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR for this
- [ ] No, I'd like someone else to implement it
